payload.answer: The statements may conflict if they refer to the same Sam and both are intended as current employment facts. Because the writes are concurrent and ambiguous, preserve both claims without treating either as superseded.

entity_resolution.reason: The name 'Sam' is ambiguous, and the two concurrent employment-related writes may refer to the same person or different people. No ordering is available to determine whether one supersedes the other.

details: Did not choose a winning fact.
Did not mark either claim as deleted or superseded.

repair_options: Clarify whether both statements refer to the same Sam.
Clarify whether Sam currently works at Goldman, currently works at Point72, or has roles at both.
Clarify whether 'joined Point72' means Sam left Goldman or is an additional/previous role.
